name: Cory Booker
subject: Our Democratic field started out as the most diverse field in modern history, and it would be a shame if diversity is not reflected on the debate stage.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I'll be honest, the billionaires in this race are making it difficult for an underdog campaign like ours.
| | |
---
| Friend, 17 times in one hour. That's how many times a _Politico_ reporter in New Hampshire saw a Tom Steyer ad while watching videos on YouTube. And that's just online. Tom Steyer and Michael Bloomberg have spent buckets of money on ads in the past few weeks -- Bloomberg spent tens of millions of dollars on new TV advertisements _**just this morning.**_ And there's no sign of them slowing down. It's efforts like this that make it so much harder for an underdog campaign like ours to break through. Right now, our campaign is still short of the polling threshold we need to reach the December debate. At this very moment, only six candidates have qualified and will be on that stage -- not a single one is a person of color. **We only have one week to qualify for the debate, and if we want to be able to compete with billionaires we 're going to need all the help we can get.** **[That's why my team set a TV ad fund of $500,000 -- can you help us get there by chipping in right now?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** These debate thresholds have had the effect of keeping candidates of color off of the stage while making it easy for billionaires and self-funders to spend their way to a podium. Our Democratic field started out as the most diverse field in modern history, and it would be a true shame if that diversity is not reflected on stage. **[Make a donation today to help us get our message out to as many people as possible so that I can represent our party's rich diversity on the December debate stage.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d89/5fca0d19/78ce71e9/291cb784/4017333047/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d89/5fca0d19/78ce71e9/291cb783/4017333047/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d89/5fca0d19/78ce71e9/291cb782/4017333047/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d89/5fca0d19/78ce71e9/291cb781/4017333047/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d89/5fca0d19/78ce71e9/291cb780/4017333047/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d89/5fca0d19/78ce71e9/291cb784/4017333047/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Impeachment Sham back to the Judiciary Committee
body:
Schiff, Nadler; Pelosi - A 3 Ring Circus No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdkulrtt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdkulrtt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdkulrtt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Impeachment Sham is now Back in the Judiciary Committee](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdkulrtt-kujkulhluu-j/)
Today the impeachment circus returns to the Judiciary Committee, on which I've served for more than two decades. In this week's blog, I discuss the latest act in the democrats' impeachment circus and how I will use my time in the committee to expose how this inquiry is dividing our country and wasting millions in taxpayer dollars. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdkulrtt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdkulrtt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [So, Any Chance Michael Bloomberg's Going to be Our Next President?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdkulrtt-kujkulhluu-d/)
Michael Bloomberg is a very successful businessman, and later served three consecutive terms as Mayor of New York City. Most would argue that he had a pretty successful run at both, although he has now refuted, and apologized for, some of his signature policies, like stop and frisk. Now he wants to be our president. This week I write about Bloomberg's chances of winning and how he will spend a fortune trying. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

name: Shad Murib, Team Hick
subject: Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
We can't afford another minute of Mitch McConnell's obstruction in the Senate. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377143a/691c9bd/6fac24f1/11a7caec/1361944800/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| **389 bills and 151 resolutions, team.**

That's how much legislation the Democratic House has passed or agreed to this year alone, but Mitch McConnell is holding up nearly all of it in the Senate.

He's single-handedly killed off legislation on everything from protecting Colorado's outdoor economy to raising the minimum wage, and his neglect is hurting Coloradans and millions of Americans every day.

We can put a stop to this next year, end McConnell's stranglehold on our democracy, and finally get government working for Coloradans. But, here's the deal--we HAVE to take the Senate back first. There's no other way.

[**_The path to stripping Mitch McConnell of his Senate majority starts right here in Colorado --you better believe McConnell and his allies are doing their best to hold on to it. Will you chip in whatever you can today?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191204_SM_20191204-fr-SM-legislation-2mo_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Here's just a sampling of policies that have been passed in the House that McConnell is stubbornly blocking in the Senate:

**Gun violence:** More than 90% of Americans support universal background checks as a tool to address the gun violence epidemic. The House passed a bill in February, but McConnell refuses to even bring it up for a vote.

**Climate change:** House Democrats have passed a comprehensive climate bill that calls on Donald Trump to rejoin the Paris Climate Accord. McConnell has gloated that the bill will "go nowhere" in the Senate.

**Violence against women:** The bipartisan Violence Against Women Act, originally passed in 1994, funds programs that are designed to protect women from violence. McConnell has sided with the NRA, and is against its reauthorization because the latest bill closes the "boyfriend loophole"--a provision that prevents partners who have been convicted of abuse and stalking from owning firearms.

**We can 't afford another minute of Mitch McConnell's partisan obstruction on the issues that matter most. Chip in now and make sure we take back the majority next November:** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191204_SM_20191204-fr-SM-legislation-2mo_2mo_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $10 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20191204_SM_20191204-fr-SM-legislation-2mo_2mo_expresslane10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

clean_body: We can't afford another minute of Mitch McConnell's obstruction in the Senate. | | | "" | 389 bills and 151 resolutions, team. That's how much legislation the Democratic House has passed or agreed to this year alone, but Mitch McConnell is holding up nearly all of it in the Senate. He's single-handedly killed off legislation on everything from protecting Colorado's outdoor economy to raising the minimum wage, and his neglect is hurting Coloradans and millions of Americans every day. We can put a stop to this next year, end McConnell's stranglehold on our democracy, and finally get government working for Coloradans. But, here's the deal--we HAVE to take the Senate back first. There's no other way. "=" Here's just a sampling of policies that have been passed in the House that McConnell is stubbornly blocking in the Senate: Gun violence: More than 90% of Americans support universal background checks as a tool to address the gun violence epidemic. The House passed a bill in February, but McConnell refuses to even bring it up for a vote. Climate change: House Democrats have passed a comprehensive climate bill that calls on Donald Trump to rejoin the Paris Climate Accord. McConnell has gloated that the bill will "go nowhere" in the Senate. Violence against women: The bipartisan Violence Against Women Act, originally passed in 1994, funds programs that are designed to protect women from violence. McConnell has sided with the NRA, and is against its reauthorization because the latest bill closes the "boyfriend loophole"--a provision that prevents partners who have been convicted of abuse and stalking from owning firearms. We can 't afford another minute of Mitch McConnell's partisan obstruction on the issues that matter most. Chip in now and make sure we take back the majority next November: If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 63 million Americans vs. 3 liberal professors
body:
The worst-kept secret in Washington is that House Democrats have already made up their minds about impeachment. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2dadd457b1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 4, 2019
---
| | |
# **63 million Americans vs. 3 liberal professors**

**The worst-kept secret** in Washington is that House Democrats have already made up their minds about impeachment. Despite the far left’s relentless push for three years to undo the 2016 election, Democrat leaders are trying to make you believe that their process is a fair and nonpartisan one.

**No American** is buying that sales pitch.

**It’s little wonder why.** After two weeks of testimony from “fact witnesses”—most of whom had never even so much as _met_ President Donald J. Trump—public support for impeachment has only fallen. So today, Congress called on four “legal experts” to try to give some Constitutional cover to their scheme.

** Bombshell moment:** [This would be the first impeachment in history without evidence of a crime.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=19738e064b&e=3ee4985eea)

**You won’t be shocked** to learn that three of these four witnesses turned out to have a lengthy history of animosity toward President Trump:
* **Prof. Pamela Karlan** is a Democratic donor who suggested the 2016 election could be “illegitimate.” She first raised the prospect of impeaching President Trump _in 2016_ —before he even took office. She’s also argued against the Trump Administration in court.

* **Prof. Noah Feldman** has spent nearly 3 years calling for impeachment—for any reason you can imagine. Less than two months after Inauguration Day, Feldman was arguing for impeachment . . . because of a _tweet_. He even called for impeachment because he disliked the President’s (perfectly Constitutional) use of the pardon power.

* **Prof. Michael Gerhardt** spent years working for Democratic officials and campaigns, repeatedly helping Democratic senators fight to block the appointment of conservative judges and justices—including now-Justice Brett Kavanaugh.

**Zero self-awareness—** that’s what it takes for House Democrats, in the midst of an effort to persuade mainstream Americans that Democrats are being fair, to call in liberal professors who are just as partisan as they are.

**But there was one** **expert** that Democrats probably wish wasn’t on the House floor today. Legal scholar Jonathan Turley, who says he isn’t a Trump supporter and didn’t vote for the President, highlighted everything wrong with Democrats’ sham process with just one line.

**If you impeach** this President, Turley said, “It is an abuse of power. It’s your abuse of power,” he told Congressional Democrats.

**“****My personal views** of President Trump are as irrelevant to my impeachment testimony as they should be to your impeachment vote,” he said to the House Judiciary Committee panel. “I’m concerned about lowering impeachment standards to fit a paucity of evidence and an abundance of anger.”

**You won’t find** a better explanation of this impeachment sham than that.

**🎬** [Democrats are conducting an impeachment in search of a crime.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b8bffca6a&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:** [“Democrats stack judiciary impeachment hearing with anti-Trump lawyers”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9fe669ea8c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **WATCH: President Trump wraps up NATO Summit **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8792ae685&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **While Congress** had its hands full today doing absolutely nothing it promised to do for the American people, President Trump represented our great country at the final day of the 2019 NATO Summit in London.

**President Trump **is making NATO stronger. Since he took office, our NATO allies have begun to meet his challenge and step up their collective defense spending to the tune of $130 billion more per year. By 2024, that number is set to rise to $400 billion.

**In fact,** one of today’s highlights was a lunch meeting with nations dubbed the “2 percenters.” That’s a reference to the 8 U.S. allies who have already met their promise of committing 2 percent of their GDPs to defense spending.

**Watch:** [President Trump meets with “2 percenter” NATO members!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bfb559a01b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump arrive to No. 10 Downing Street in London to attend a reception in honor of the 70th anniversary of NATO** | December 3, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7eb5fe62b3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab9373e30b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0dce330156)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: IMPEACHMENT ALERT
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No Images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdkudrhd-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

Right now, I am fighting to protect the president in a House Judiciary Committee hearing... on IMPEACHMENT. And I need your support to keep fighting.

Thanks to the Democrats’ witch hunt obsession, impeachment is closer to happening now more than ever! Some estimate that a full House vote could come before Christmas, just a few weeks away. We need to show Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi that the American people do not support their impeachment charade.

I’m counting on you to stand with me right now – this is too big to sit on the sidelines and watch happen.

We need to defend our President from the Democrats, who have been desperate to remove him from office from the moment he stepped foot into the White House.

STOP IMPEACHMENT [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_impeachment_20191204_impeachmenthearing_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

As a member of the House Judiciary Committee, I am fighting hard to defend the president from these ludicrous attacks -- but I need your help.

Let’s show Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and Jerry Nadler that Ohio stands with our President! Will chip in now to send a message to Washington Democrats, during this hearing, that we stand by Donald J. Trump?

STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_impeachment_20191204_impeachmenthearing_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

We don’t have much time – we need to send a message during this hearing – it’s happening now! https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/ [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_impeachment_20191204_impeachmenthearing_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

–Steve Chabot

6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. subject: Will You Help Dean
body:

---
| Dear Friends, As we approach the end of our fundraising deadline for the year, I am excited to tell you that the Browning for Congress campaign is working extremely hard to meet our fundraising goal by December 31st. We've been laser focused on raising the financial resources necessary to fight for the values that the Lehigh Valley and our great nation hold dear. Please contribute now to help us achieve our fundraising goal for this quarter. Our donor base is comprised of grassroots activists such as yourself who will not settle for politics as usual in our nation's capital. Please help us send a message to Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats that a we are ready to take back the PA-7th Congressional District. Help make sure that Nancy Pelosi does not return to the Speakership and that she and Susan Wild will not in a position to lead us down the path of open borders, high unemployment, and a dismal economy. Help stop the failed policies that are not in the best interest of the Lehigh Valley or this country. Please contribute $25, $50, or $100 today and let's continue President Trump's policies that have brought historic low unemployment rates, a robust economy and that put America First. Together, we will continue to restore greatness to our beloved country

https://secure.winred.com/DeanBrowning/donate
Sincerely,
Cynthia Anderson Campaign Manager

---

subject: Taking a stand against Big Pharma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Sign Eugene’s petition if you agree it’s time to lower the cost of prescription drugs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12558804/129301123/-379413345?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWRjMzdjNi04MjE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xk9ZFYU-5S4dO7FXQVJQLIT3jmhpeT_uWZS_y4gFwuo=&emci=ea5dc94a-6e17-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1dc37c6-8217-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249) [**Sign Eugene’s petition if you agree it’s time to lower the cost of prescription drugs →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12558805/129301124/-379413345?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWRjMzdjNi04MjE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xk9ZFYU-5S4dO7FXQVJQLIT3jmhpeT_uWZS_y4gFwuo=&emci=ea5dc94a-6e17-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1dc37c6-8217-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)
As Pennsylvania’s Auditor General, Eugene released a report calling for better oversight of Big Pharma in order to lower drug costs. This report brought light to how these companies cost Pennsylvania taxpayers billions of dollars per year -- while hurting the people who need these life-saving medications.

**The good news:** The Pennsylvania state legislature is moving to take action in direct response to Eugene’s report, which will help people right here in PA.

**The bad news:** It’s not enough. Addressing the influence of these companies here in PA is a start, but there are things that need done at the federal level to help curb these costs.

**This isn’t just an issue facing Pennsylvanians, this is an issue that impacts people across the country. The rising costs of prescription drugs is an issue that is taking a toll on the majority of people in America today.**

[**Sign Eugene’s petition to tell Congress that now is the time to lower prescription drug costs for all Americans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12558806/129301125/-379413345?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWRjMzdjNi04MjE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xk9ZFYU-5S4dO7FXQVJQLIT3jmhpeT_uWZS_y4gFwuo=&emci=ea5dc94a-6e17-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1dc37c6-8217-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249) | [Lower Rx prices »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12558807/129301126/664405716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWRjMzdjNi04MjE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xk9ZFYU-5S4dO7FXQVJQLIT3jmhpeT_uWZS_y4gFwuo=&emci=ea5dc94a-6e17-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1dc37c6-8217-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)
---

We need leaders in Congress like Eugene who are willing to stand up to Big Pharma. Eugene’s leadership in Pennsylvania has proven that he is ready for the fight, and in Congress, he will continue fighting to lower the cost of prescription drugs. [Stand with Eugene now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12558808/129301127/664405716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWRjMzdjNi04MjE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xk9ZFYU-5S4dO7FXQVJQLIT3jmhpeT_uWZS_y4gFwuo=&emci=ea5dc94a-6e17-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1dc37c6-8217-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)
---

Together, we can take a stand against the big pharmaceutical companies that seek to take advantage of consumers -- and we need action at every level of government to do so.

Thank you for making your voice heard.

\--Team Eugene [Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12558809/129301128/480453248?refcode=em_pet_2019.12.05_b1_te_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWRjMzdjNi04MjE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xk9ZFYU-5S4dO7FXQVJQLIT3jmhpeT_uWZS_y4gFwuo=)
---
Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12558810/129301129/2030982902?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWRjMzdjNi04MjE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xk9ZFYU-5S4dO7FXQVJQLIT3jmhpeT_uWZS_y4gFwuo=&emci=ea5dc94a-6e17-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1dc37c6-8217-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12558811/129301130/409343711?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWRjMzdjNi04MjE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xk9ZFYU-5S4dO7FXQVJQLIT3jmhpeT_uWZS_y4gFwuo=&emci=ea5dc94a-6e17-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1dc37c6-8217-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12558812/129301131/445060596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWRjMzdjNi04MjE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xk9ZFYU-5S4dO7FXQVJQLIT3jmhpeT_uWZS_y4gFwuo=&emci=ea5dc94a-6e17-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1dc37c6-8217-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)

clean_body: Sign Eugene’s petition if you agree it’s time to lower the cost of prescription drugs. As Pennsylvania’s Auditor General, Eugene released a report calling for better oversight of Big Pharma in order to lower drug costs. This report brought light to how these companies cost Pennsylvania taxpayers billions of dollars per year -- while hurting the people who need these life-saving medications. The good news: The Pennsylvania state legislature is moving to take action in direct response to Eugene’s report, which will help people right here in PA. The bad news: It’s not enough. Addressing the influence of these companies here in PA is a start, but there are things that need done at the federal level to help curb these costs. This isn’t just an issue facing Pennsylvanians, this is an issue that impacts people across the country. The rising costs of prescription drugs is an issue that is taking a toll on the majority of people in America today. | We need leaders in Congress like Eugene who are willing to stand up to Big Pharma. Eugene’s leadership in Pennsylvania has proven that he is ready for the fight, and in Congress, he will continue fighting to lower the cost of prescription drugs. Together, we can take a stand against the big pharmaceutical companies that seek to take advantage of consumers -- and we need action at every level of government to do so. Thank you for making your voice heard. \--Team Eugene = Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit . | Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10 DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. name: Addisu Demissie
subject: Our party is better than this. It's time we show it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| As the current December debate lineup stands, **not a single one of the candidates who will appear on stage is a person of color.** This is a shame. The 2020 Democratic field promised one of -- if not _the_ \-- most diverse sets of candidates in modern history, though you wouldn't see that from looking at the frontrunners. **Our party is better than this. It 's time we show it.** **[If you agree, please consider chipping in to our campaign. Anything you can give will help get Cory's voice heard across the nation.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191205_AD_20191205-fr-AD-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It's a shame that after this race started with the most diverse field of presidential candidates in the history of the Democratic Party, as it stands right now, not a single person of color is on the debate stage. It's frustrating that billionaires with bottomless checkbooks seem to have a clearer path to qualify for the debate than grassroots campaigns like ours. But tough challenges have never stopped Cory before, and they're not going to stop our campaign now. **Let me be crystal clear: We are going all out doing everything we can to get Cory on that December debate stage.** **[Chip in right now to support a debate stage that reflects the rich diversity of our party and of our country.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191205_AD_20191205-fr-AD-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We know the candidate that will unite and energize the full breadth of the Democratic Party is the best candidate to beat Trump -- and that's Cory. Cory has led the field on issues like gun violence plaguing our communities, to the cancer on the soul of our nation that is mass incarceration, to the moral sin of perpetuating intergenerational poverty while corporations pay next to nothing in taxes. He's providing a voice to so many who feel left out of our political process. Cory can and has united moderate and progressive Democrats. He can and has excited and engaged Black voters, the most loyal constituency of our party. And Cory is the only person in this race who can rebuild the coalition that elected President Obama that we need in order to defeat Donald Trump. We're going to continue to run this campaign the way Cory's always won campaigns in the past: By outworking the competition with the resources we have from the generosity of people giving what they can -- $5, $10 at a time -- to fuel this campaign. **[Won't you join them?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191205_AD_20191205-fr-AD-EM1-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** There's no time to lose. Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191205_AD_20191205-fr-AD-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d88/5fca0d19/78f2b94b/291cb612/1570779787/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d88/5fca0d19/78f2b94b/291cb611/1570779787/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d88/5fca0d19/78f2b94b/291cb610/1570779787/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d88/5fca0d19/78f2b94b/291cb61f/1570779787/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d88/5fca0d19/78f2b94b/291cb61e/1570779787/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d88/5fca0d19/78f2b94b/291cb612/1570779787/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Peter,
It's really happening. Nancy Pelosi has officially ordered articles of impeachment to be drawn up against President Trump.
Schiff's bogus hearings turned up no new evidence and showed that President Trump should not be impeached.
Instead of doing real work for the people, Democrats in Congress have been obsessed with impeaching President Trump since the moment he was elected.
This betrayal has to stop. NOW. We are represented by a member of Congress who supports this impeachment hoax. It's time for Colin Allred to go.

Friend,

This past weekend my campaign had a critical fundraising deadline and I was just updated that _we missed our goal_. **[I have extended the deadline but if we don’t raise an additional $5,000 before midnight](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=fa29d77e07744d3a9571a38aa06744f4&_e=GkNFI6MPJ2qdkEKDQHP_4YYSisdnpKZkxdvZJOMa0Kpjo59CjWToUSOlcXCJCP2sbTlNz1b6TRVIF4P2rv9GHx-oHtqOB2rx-rLOrGdqwnD1mACQn9ehrKnAUABa-UsolWNDy3MCM8NxijkOx4C34Q1EUhzDlSzfmE7sPgkVdXnpfQJF0ratALZViZ9rFcquo4KLaKvAS6FfnXXTba_jXCMS1fnxP6xOX79QWS74JtQwM78zGsI0Otp3Z5Ux45R52_LzjAtvziO9sANMDioY4GUwNijFfD1ksWSD_7lfr1U4Eu0lub67bFpq9LSKrRbzqI9W9VM-Tr6EnHkXQU_usp_XnFQzeQFh4xAtJ192vFy9-d3X-1GH-U-kKxjgBfYsn9Y3txfr9Ex7fGPd3UbUSg%3D%3D)** – it’s adiós to my campaign.

I’m not planning on going down without a fight. **[Would you help me crush this November goal, restore Law and Order, and WIN THIS RACE by donating $25, $50, $100 or more before midnight?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=fa29d77e07744d3a9571a38aa06744f4&_e=GkNFI6MPJ2qdkEKDQHP_4YYSisdnpKZkxdvZJOMa0Kpjo59CjWToUSOlcXCJCP2sbTlNz1b6TRVIF4P2rv9GHx-oHtqOB2rx-rLOrGdqwnD1mACQn9ehrKnAUABa-UsolWNDy3MCM8NxijkOx4C34Q1EUhzDlSzfmE7sPgkVdXnpfQJF0ratALZViZ9rFcqusI24GO9ev8NP0pNFyQG0YnelCW8zu2RUZQtHMKhu3Sv6incvT3NiLxkuWbTKDYhOY_1F-I4lMj-M3CAzF9bCErlkdquOc08jvscKwHG2_BVKu54_KJLQxXLbvb0Af0dtOsf0nXxD98gmf88j6era7i4sl4DfwYn_hfguGpM6kxukXvMnSXvx8VQc7bT_eyKvmyriY0-1rJPhrpruThpyDw%3D%3D)**

Since I announced my campaign to be re-elected Sheriff of Maricopa County the DC Establishment has fought tooth and nail to see me defeated.

They know **_I don’t play nice with socialists_** and **_forget about political correctness_** – I tell it like it is.

Because of loyal supporters, like yourself, who know I have stood with President Trump since day one and that my track record speaks for itself – I’ve been able to stay in this race and combat the Radical Left.

I just need to raise an additional $5,000 before midnight. **[Can I count on you to help me one last time?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=fa29d77e07744d3a9571a38aa06744f4&_e=GkNFI6MPJ2qdkEKDQHP_4YYSisdnpKZkxdvZJOMa0Kpjo59CjWToUSOlcXCJCP2sbTlNz1b6TRVIF4P2rv9GHx-oHtqOB2rx-rLOrGdqwnD1mACQn9ehrKnAUABa-UsolWNDy3MCM8NxijkOx4C34Q1EUhzDlSzfmE7sPgkVdXnpfQJF0ratALZViZ9rFcquaTM6heEiJipm0iduCMifyca0XAM3IoT1zaDVdul_OLBtpVcfK0UAaF4wg4ICmXbPG1mkDNuyJvovIkZQmfQySpbc604lOspYWPVgAo3uy9YvcoK9x7I4pqwZigMRtkyq-_KAq0JXzz3pGX55m7-b_ODH3nYETW_TVwP-ZlrTNQDLIiGntCo1i4X6evsjiIzk26fKPUYA1ue2FvjaMRZAnA%3D%3D)**

They countered his negative attacks with our One Minnesota message that recognizes our strength in unity, and proved that Minnesotans are ready to reject the politics of division once again in 2020.](https://act.myngp.com/el/wXRp9dUaeJFBWed_9HCtXn0zgGBetBoCo9Gxl5NSb08=/gWabdPwTETM7uEKNxUPsMHOHvkBVU-OJHh9GspZDu8M=?refcode=mid&amount=25)

#
Dear Friends,
As we approach the end of our fundraising deadline for the year, I am excited to tell you that the Browning for Congress campaign is working extremely hard to meet our fundraising goal by December 31st. We’ve been laser focused on raising the financial resources necessary to fight for the values that the Lehigh Valley and our great nation hold dear. Please contribute now to help us achieve our fundraising goal for this quarter.
Our donor base is comprised of grassroots activists such as yourself who will not settle for politics as usual in our nation’s capital. Please help us send a message to Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats that a we are ready to take back the PA-7th Congressional District. Help make sure that Nancy Pelosi does not return to the Speakership and that she and Susan Wild will not in a position to lead us down the path of open borders, high unemployment, and a dismal economy. Help stop the failed policies that are not in the best interest of the Lehigh Valley or this country. Please contribute $25, $50, or $100 today and let’s continue President Trump’s policies that have brought historic low unemployment rates, a robust economy and that put America First. Together, we will continue to restore greatness to our beloved country

Sincerely,

Cynthia Anderson
Campaign Manager

From: **Elisa Cardnell**
Date: Wednesday, December 7
Subject: Why do our districts look so funny?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter,
In the 2018 Texas Congressional elections, Democrats received 47% of the votes and Republicans received 53%. If the 36 congressional seats in Texas were split proportionately then there would be 19 Republican representatives and 17 Democrats - yet we somehow ended up with 23 Republicans and 13 Democrats.
How? **Gerrymandering - when a political group manipulates an electoral map to gain an unfair advantage.**
[_**Join me in calling on Congress to end the ridiculous practice of gerrymandering today >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12563995/129351553/-1279509791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI3NmZkMy05OTE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxc0XWLT0A97Mub78HAeQ9Ddd8bAsn7svBoew9_GMpc=&emci=23a95706-9617-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f4b76fd3-9917-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
Just look at the funky shape of our district:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12563997/129351556/-1279509791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI3NmZkMy05OTE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxc0XWLT0A97Mub78HAeQ9Ddd8bAsn7svBoew9_GMpc=&emci=23a95706-9617-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f4b76fd3-9917-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
Our district, like so many others across the country, has been reshaped to give Republicans an advantage. [_**This harmful practice undermines the power of our democracy. Join me today in calling on Congress to end partisan gerrymandering >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12564001/129351569/-1279509791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI3NmZkMy05OTE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxc0XWLT0A97Mub78HAeQ9Ddd8bAsn7svBoew9_GMpc=&emci=23a95706-9617-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f4b76fd3-9917-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
This issue is too important to ignore - we have to act now. [_**We are aiming for 500 signatures on our petition before the end of the day today - be one of 500 to get us to our goal >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12564004/129351588/-1279509791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI3NmZkMy05OTE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxc0XWLT0A97Mub78HAeQ9Ddd8bAsn7svBoew9_GMpc=&emci=23a95706-9617-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f4b76fd3-9917-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12564007/129351593/-1279509791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI3NmZkMy05OTE3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxc0XWLT0A97Mub78HAeQ9Ddd8bAsn7svBoew9_GMpc=&emci=23a95706-9617-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f4b76fd3-9917-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)****

name: Bill Olson
subject: Remember Washington and Lee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.1abOV12l6OuRU&b=q5tpLLY3gvCc4LAgH7Z0VQ

Hi Peter

You know, I believe those who do not know history are doomed to repeat it.

But the young socialists- like AOC- are taking that proverb as some sort of challenge!

Washington and Lee University in Lexington, VA is the latest front in the culture wars for the insane left:

Students at a Virginia law school are asking the administration to remove portraits of 'controversial' figures George Washington and Robert E. Lee from their graduation diplomas.

Current students as well as some alumni and staff at the Washington & Lee University School of Law are circulating a petition to allow graduates the option of omitting pictures of the university's namesakes.

Now understand, that the university was named for George Washington and Robert E. Lee in 1870. That means that every single person who worked there or attended there knew what it was named, BEFORE going there and complaining about it!

The "woke" Left has gone insane, trying to take away our liberties and make every part of our lives bow to their "feelings". They must be stopped!

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: impeachment
body:
We want to hear from you.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f9f/4bef7a87/6b92ad37/287fe713/1916750485/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
When reporters ask Susan Collins about impeachment, she avoids the question with this constant refrain:
She _says_ she can't comment because she is "very likely to be a juror."
**We don 't buy that **- especially since Collins recently attended a private lunch with President Trump to discuss impeachment. What do you think?
[**Take our survey about Senator Collins and Trump 's impeachment proceedings. It won't take more than a couple minutes.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f9f/4bef7a87/6b92ad37/287fe712/1916750485/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/impeachment-survey-nov?source=em191205-1-full")
Your opinion really does matter. Surveys like this one help us stay connected with our supporters on the important issues.
So thank you for sharing your thoughts!
All our best,
Team Sara
******[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f9f/4bef7a87/6b92ad37/287fe712/1916750485/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/impeachment-survey-nov?source=em191205-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Dean Browning for Congress
subject: Stand with me to preserve our American Dreams
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
It has been a wonderful meeting people and attending events throughout the PA-7th Congressional District. It is an honor and privilege to listen to the hopes, dreams and concerns of the people I hope to represent in Congress. Throughout my travel in the district, one thing is very clear. We have an unbreakable American spirit, full of hope and with an eye on building and maintaining the best America for us and future generations to come. Please contribute to my campaign today so we may continue down the right path for our nation.
The PA-7th Congressional District is one that Nancy Pelosi and the Democratic machine have targeted as critical for their quest to keep the majority in Congress and keep Pelosi as the Speaker. After just a year in office, Susan Wild and the Democrats have shown that they want to return us to the failed domestic and international policies that hurt our economy, hurt our security and ultimately hurt the American people. We need people in Congress who will work tirelessly to implement President Trump's agenda, so we may continue prospering domestically and being strong on the international stage. Please contribute $25, $50 or $100 today to send a message that the PA-7th Congressional District will not be part of the Democrats play for power. We are a land of individual liberties and rights that guarantee us the opportunity to peruse our vision of the American Dream. Please stand with me and continue to fight for our American Dream.
Click here to donate!
[https://secure.winred.com/DeanBrowning/donate](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M9F63xjbNOvIFLSGYHUH_8WGN0mJOpVE8TK-Pd0jZ6_NrSCkuF83AFH-WCDQP_hXPZve_gvBmiRlMW1DJsCv5Njc_TWqDH57CxLC0c7YNIZ-LyyKr1IcrtfKy62II_RPH0IJ-ED_P5zxr3QvYRhP_B-Pjb3ryaMlIZSJbNQ7Mb0DjrmeXnyHUw==&c=h31bGcp__lZN-jcHEjlySH8QwrozH7xBIo7TjL8MHj1FndubG7xCNw==&ch=4yZfyx1OqebeXns-G3arIm4f_oyvqs77Xa72gEZgergkAySXuXMKsA==)
Thank you and God Bless,
Dean

---

name: John Kerry, World War Zero <Via LeftAction>
subject: Add your name: Enlist in the World War Zero army
body:
| Our future is watching -- will you step up now? | World War Zero launched to realize a net zero emissions economy and end the climate crisis for good. [**Join the movement today.**](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=kY6Dbr9WlYjHePM8VGKvcfcl3KkQO0ZK)
---
| [ENLIST >>](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=x5%2BNa8jCtY7GfKUjWr7X1Pcl3KkQO0ZK)
---

Friend --
This is a war for our future.
Pollution kills millions every year. There's a war on facts, science, and common sense that's prevented us from doing what we all know we must do.
We have started World War Zero because we have no choice but to wage and win the war to realize a net zero emissions economy and end the climate crisis.
[ **_Now I 'm asking you to join us. Enlist in our army to combat the climate crisis: Add your name to join World War Zero today._**](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5Q07ci14FGkJqRWxqYMzavcl3KkQO0ZK)
We will bring together an unlikely group of allies, with diverse backgrounds and beliefs, united by a common mission. Together, we'll make World War Zero unlike anything we've seen before. And that's important because the war ahead will only be won with bold tactics and fresh perspectives. Now, I'm asking you to take the next big step to support our mission.
[ **_That starts today by joining World War Zero: Add your name to join us to combat the climate crisis together._**](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YTjBMV5xRzgEqn2xohMLv%2Fcl3KkQO0ZK)
| [ADD YOUR NAME >>](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=EPpgTI70%2Btd4j1rjBskqxvcl3KkQO0ZK)
---
This is a battle for our future, our very lives -- a struggle against denial, distraction, and delay.
[ **With your help, pollution and surrender won 't write our future: We will.**](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=6jBQlgJnE3tq5o3PMf8a9Pcl3KkQO0ZK)
To win this war, World War Zero will forge new alliances. Included in our ranks are Democrats and Republicans and Independents, artists and diplomats, retired military leaders and young climate activists, business leaders and consumer advocates -- and you.
Together, we will cut through the noise. We will deliver the message that the climate crisis is a threat to more than just the environment. It's a threat to our jobs, our health, and our security. This message will resonate in all quarters, change minds, and turn the tide.
| [JOIN THE WORLD WAR ZERO ARMY TODAY >>](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JGhAnomU2YsL54z%2FmSYEUfcl3KkQO0ZK)
---
Winning this war demands bold proposals. Winning requires beating back efforts to delay progress, distort the truth, and deny reality. Winning depends on new strategies, new tactics, and new alliances. [**It 's time to win this war, and we need your help. **](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=zMv7LbLc%2FZJQW3yIEc6lEfcl3KkQO0ZK)
[ **_Join the World War Zero army today: Add your name to join the fight to end the climate crisis._**](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Gm33z177dgK18H27f0BJNHhEWfohskut)__
Onward,
[ John Kerry](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=NrAZvMaBKe2hfMasUFfHYfcl3KkQO0ZK)
|

Stay up to date with Left Action by following us on **[Facebook](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=33%2Fpj7rlX%2B3vK%2F7hheDoS%2Fcl3KkQO0ZK) ** and **[Twitter](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JYxlDJrBHppRFW5l2OAVQPcl3KkQO0ZK) **!
You have received this email because you took one of our actions, or subscribed to our email list.
If you did not subscribe, or would no longer like to receive email updates [unsubscribe here](http://salsa.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=dbNF3aTeDIenKr1hceGVxPcl3KkQO0ZK).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff have orchestrated the greatest political hit-job our country has ever seen.

Make no mistake, now that this SCAM has reached the House Judiciary Committee, our Commander in Chief is one step closer to being impeached and removed from office.

body:
| | |
---
| |

name: Rob Portman
subject: Say NO to Socialism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Portman for Senate Committee | [Privacy Policy](http://www
body:
Peter -- In his State of the Union speech earlier this year, President Donald Trump said that **“America will never be a socialist country.” I couldn’t agree more.** As we look around the globe, we see examples like Venezuela where socialism has turned a once prosperous nation into a chaotic land of suffering, pain, and destruction. Yet here in the United States, many Democrats on the left want to move us in that same destructive direction. Many of the Democrats running for president are advocating for bigger government, trillions more in spending, and socialist policies like Medicare for All that would devastate Ohio’s economy and our nation's prosperity. **We can’t let that happen.** **Can you[donate, $20, $50, or $100](https://www.robportman.com/donation_v2?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191203_socialism&n=1) today** **to help us push back against the socialist agenda coming from the liberal left in Washington?** Will you [**stand with me**](https://www.robportman.com/donation_v2?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191203_socialism&n=2) to help ensure America remains a place where everyone has a chance to succeed because the free market economy allows innovation and small businesses to thrive? All best, Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sYYV_ledEgoYeQO-o30kdJeTLiOkPFE0-_P396RlgQw&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191203_socialism&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tgt5i9qzFHm-zEGuH8vKJ58&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191203_socialism&n=4)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191203_socialism&n=5)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191203_socialism&n=6).

You can also keep up with Rob Portman on [Twitter](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNFH-_6OxP5XDDu7-tGRxb-c&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191203_socialism&n=7) or [Facebook](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sYYV_ledEgoYeQO-o30kdIFdWO15ZZgfTH4Suo9WAEj&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191203_socialism&n=8).

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Joni for Iowa. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Joni for Iowa's online community. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Let's Purge the Profiteers from DC
body:
Reforms to End Careerist DC Politicians

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/7c02036e35f6/lets-purge-the-profiteers-from-dc?e=41f8e27552)

Dear Friend,

Careerist politicians in Washington are largely absent from their desks six months out of the year, yet they are richly rewarded and parade about like kings and queens.

It's time we give them a 'royal flush', impose term limits and end the incentives that draw the profiteers rather than the public servants to our capitol.

I announced today reforms to put an end to the careerist politician in Washington by ripping out by the roots the shameful incentives and tricks used to keep them in office.

I need your support to show the DC careerists that we are serious and we're not going to play their games any more. Will you become a Term Limits voter by clicking below to add your name as a supporter of this effort?
YES! I SUPPORT TERM LIMITS! (https://lindstromforsenate.com/term-limits-pledge/?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=bef550619c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_05_12_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-bef550619c-180644441)

** STOP CAREERIST TRICKS AND INCENTIVES
------------------------------------------------------------
1) Establish Strong Term Limits. I've signed the Term Limits Pledge committing to serve no more than two Senate terms and work toward ensuring others do the same.
2) Ban Campaign Fund Transfers. Careerist politicians often leverage their current office to raise campaign funds to finance pursuing higher office. It's a practice already banned in Kansas at the state level and should be banned at the federal level.

3) End Suspect PAC Contributions. Elected officials should be prohibited from accepting PAC contributions from industries with business before the committees upon which the official serves. Committees should operate without a cloud of undue influence.

4) Eliminate Congressional Pensions. Senate and House members draw a salary of $174,000 or more than three times the average American's income, and more than enough to save for their retirement. These pensions cost more than $36 million.

5) Reduce Salaries for Poor Performance. For every $1 billion in overspending added to the annual deficit, salaries of congress and the president should be reduced by $100. If this mechanism had existed, passage of recent spending would have reduced each politician's salary by $100,000, or more than $53 million.
I NEED YOUR HELP TO MAKE IT HAPPEN

Our campaign is funded by your citizen contributions of any amount, big or small. Can I count on your support to end the careerist culture in Washington?
DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=bef550619c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_05_12_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-bef550619c-180644441)
Your contribution today makes a critical difference as we enter the final weeks for our year end finance report. A strong report will send a message to Washington that you are fired up and ready to take back our capitol. PLEASE DONATE TODAY!

DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=bef550619c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_05_12_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-bef550619c-180644441)

Thank you for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!

Dave

P.S. Don't forget to follow us online: www.lindstromforsenate.com and on social media @LindstromforKS

While my opponents would support devastating funding cuts and privatization, I'm committed to protecting this essential program. **Let me know how strongly you feel about this:**[https://act.myngp.com/Forms/152479448903388160](https://act.myngp.com/el/KN34D6Z5RYVnmYjnhRKXvFL5UWF7rYV6ByHGy0E6tds=/MRdfHtvtHeF0tmQi7AFV5sV8uxfRXoCCaeG4Tvya9zI=) \- Rita Hart **\-------- Begin Forwarded Message --------** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/KN34D6Z5RYVnmYjnhRKXvFL5UWF7rYV6ByHGy0E6tds=/MRdfHtvtHeF0tmQi7AFV5sV8uxfRXoCCaeG4Tvya9zI=) Social Security is a critical safety net that millions of Americans rely on -- including almost one in five Iowans. It's our neighborly duty to ensure that the most vulnerable members of our communities don't have the rug pulled out from underneath them. name: Democratic Polling Center
subject: who is your favorite president: Trump, Obama, Bush, or Clinton?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
We still can't believe this, Team - Donald Trump claims he's among the greatest presidents - if not THE greatest president - ever.

Despite losing the popular vote, low approval ratings, and now an impeachment inquiry - Trump feels empowered to try to destroy Obama's legacy. Trump is rolling back environmental protections, attacking a woman's right to choose and _still_ - somehow - trying to take health care away from millions of Americans.
**Trump can 't find an approval poll that ranks him anywhere near President Obama. So we wanted to give him a chance: We're asking you to confirm the truth. We need 37 more supporters from 34223 to respond before midnight: [_How would you rank Trump among our last four presidents?_](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTY2NzQyMTkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMxOTc1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Impeachment-Obsessed Democrats Ignore Logic and Law as 4 Professors Testify at Hearing
body:
"It is tempting to describe Wednesday’s impeachment hearing before the House Judiciary Committee as a farce. But it was worse than that." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e102add337&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Impeachment-Obsessed Democrats Ignore Logic and Law as 4 Professors Testify at Hearing**

“It is tempting to describe Wednesday’s impeachment hearing before the House Judiciary Committee as a farce. But it was worse than that. It made a travesty of fairness,” Gregg Jarrett writes for Fox News.

“[Chairman Jerrold] Nadler assembled a team of three liberal law professors who were already on record as antagonistic to President Trump. During their daylong testimony, the hostility was palpable. There was little effort to disguise the relentless Democratic agenda to remove Trump from office by hell or high water.”

[Click here to read the full summary of yesterday’s hearing.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9fca164b30&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| "Democrats are eyeing an impeachment count for obstruction of justice, simply because Trump has demanded court rulings before allowing top aides to testify in these hearings. Notes Turley, ‘If you make a high crime and misdemeanor out of going to the courts, it is an abuse of power. It’s your abuse of power,’" the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d2d591a77c&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Democrats are trying to convince Americans that President Trump should be ousted for trying to ‘dig up dirt’ on a rival. They’d have more credibility if they didn’t abuse their surveillance powers for drive-by smears of Republicans and a free press,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97d9f4d62e&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “House Democrats don't need advice from journalists on how to be ruthlessly partisan, because that's their natural state.” But _New York Times_ writer Jamelle Bouie is here to help where he can. “Bouie cautioned Democrats against voting in favor of the Trump administration's new trade deal with Mexico and Canada solely because it would be politically helpful for the president,” Eddie Scarry writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ade7f7e603&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b7db8664c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1ade25a57b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6895339a59)
---

---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Nancy Pelosi stands up for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | All systems are go, Peter. Nancy Pelosi announced this morning that the House Judiciary is moving forward with drafting the articles of impeachment. This follows a day of law professors explaining exactly how Trump's committed impeachable offenses \-- that Trump is what the founders had in mind when drafting their language on impeachment \-- while Republicans stuck their fingers in their ears and whistled. For those of you following the goalposts as they jet around the field, Trump's new line of defense is that he was asking Ukraine to help "us" as in America, not "us" as in Trump and his menagerie of half-baked Spiro Agnews. The president's going to continue trying to distract America from the truth, so we need to know what engaged Democrats think: **Do you support impeachment?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb0/6e9863e8/16f2af99/1db0bf7a/3888391148/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/gMgK6Z05") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb0/6e9863e8/16f2af99/1db0bf7a/3888391148/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/gMgK6Z05") Thank you for participating, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb0/6e9863e8/16f2af99/1db0bf79/3888391148/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191205a.ND&refcode2=MEVDAxJefesdl5VKvQ8D")

name: Impeachment Update (via NikkiFosterOH.com)
subject: Frankly, Chabot's behavior yesterday was insulting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
---
| | During yesterday's impeachment hearing, Republican Steve Chabot had a chance to question constitutional scholars about impeachment. Instead, he went on an unhinged tyrade: Cincinnati Enquirer: Chabot decried the proceedings as...a foregone conclusion that the Democrat-controlled committee will vote for impeachment. 'That's what their hardcore, Trump-hating base wants,' Chabot said. Chabot went on to ramble about the dangers of a "party-line impeachment," which is particularly ironic, given the fact that he authored the impeachment articles against President Clinton -- which fell, you guessed it, mostly along party lines. His blind partisan loyalty has not gone unnoticed, it sparked outrage across the internet as people pointed out his hypocrisy. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - During yesterday's impeachment hearing, Republican Steve Chabot had a chance to question constitutional scholars about impeachment. **Instead, he went on an unhinged tyrade:** [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_hearings?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191205_Hearings2_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191205_Hearings2_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191205_Hearings2_U1_X1") Chabot went on to ramble about the dangers of a "party-line impeachment," which is particularly ironic, given the fact that he authored the impeachment articles against President Clinton -- **which fell, you guessed it, mostly along party lines**. clean_body: | | During yesterday's impeachment hearing, Republican Steve Chabot had a chance to question constitutional scholars about impeachment. Instead, he went on an unhinged tyrade: Cincinnati Enquirer: Chabot decried the proceedings as...a foregone conclusion that the Democrat-controlled committee will vote for impeachment. 'That's what their hardcore, Trump-hating base wants,' Chabot said. Chabot went on to ramble about the dangers of a "party-line impeachment," which is particularly ironic, given the fact that he authored the impeachment articles against President Clinton -- which fell, you guessed it, mostly along party lines. subject: [Survey] House Democrats need to bring this up for a vote

We must pass the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement. body:
---
| | I can't believe what I'm seeing. **FIRST:** Polls showed we could UNSEAT McConnell for the first time in 30 years -- and his entire Senate. **THEN:** McConnell plunged to just ONE POINT away from losing his seat. **NOW:** I just learned that the latest polls show Democrats statistically TIED with McConnell!! Listen -- if we lose my Senate race, we will completely blow this historic shot to unseat McConnell's Senate. I need 375 gifts before midnight to keep my critical ads running and WIN. Can you help? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191205_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Let's win this race and take back the entire Senate.

Ben Ray

|

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d2/18e32a7f/50743f8b/7b22ac96/3250952384/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d2/18e32a7f/50743f8b/7b22ac97/3250952384/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d2/18e32a7f/50743f8b/7b22ac94/3250952384/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d2/18e32a7f/50743f8b/7b22ac95/3250952384/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d2/18e32a7f/50743f8b/7b22ac8a/3250952384/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d2/18e32a7f/50743f8b/7b22ac8b/3250952384/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

clean_body: Team, Last month, I asked you to chip in to make sure we hit our monthly fundraising goal -- now, I want to follow up and let you know where we stand: Thanks to you and your incredible support, we were just able to hit our goal for November. Without corporate PAC money, we're relying 100% on your grassroots support to fund this campaign. So, really, thank you! But now, as we head into the final month of 2019, we need to reach an even more ambitious goal to keep our movement growing. This quarter ends at the end of December -- which means our fundraising reports will be going public! And we need to make a BIG impact with our fundraising report to prove the strength of our movement and ensure our momentum keeps growing. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for your ongoing support! Will Washington Campaign Manager, Sri for Congress | Begin forwarded message: Team, This month has been incredibly busy for our movement: We had local elections here in Texas, Sri was endorsed by End Citizens United, and TX-22 was just featured as a Toss-Up District by POLITICO! We're so pumped by this good news, but in all the craziness, I've barely had time to check our fundraising numbers...and y'all, I'm embarrassed to say we're a bit behind! If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- We need to spread our recent good news far and wide to build our movement's momentum on the ground in TX-22. But with impeachment hearings and the presidential primary taking up so much of the airwaves, it's hard to cut through the noise to our voters. It 'll take a big financial push to spread our good news in Texas, which means hitting (or even exceeding!) this month's goal is essential. Can you help us out? | --- Thank you for all you do to power this movement! Will Washington Campaign Manager, Sri for Congress | --- STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT = = = | Paid for by Sri for Congress. name: Dean Browning for Congress
subject: Let's keep the momentum going!
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Friends, We have a choice to make this election cycle. Do we want a Congressperson who is going to avoid taking a stance on the tough issues and who won't say what they believe? OR do we want a Congressman Dean Browning who will be a Congressperson for us and who will be clear and transparent about his beliefs and goals. Please donate today and help spread Dean's message throughout the PA-7th Congressional District If Dean's opponent were to be re- elected, it is almost certain that Nancy Pelosi would remain as Speaker of the House of Representatives which would damage our economy and our nation tremendously. Friends, we cannot let this happen. We have made too much progress and ushered in too much prosperity under President Trump's leadership to let Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats continue to try and undo everything. Dean has the winning message and would be a Congressman we could all be proud of. But he will not be able to get that message out without you. Please donate $25, $50 or $100 today and let's elect a Congressman for us - Dean Browning. Click here to donate!
https://secure.winred.com/DeanBrowning/donate
Kelly Tain General Consultant

---
|

Everyone will be watching to see if we have what it takes to stay at the top of this competitive primary. **We know it’s still early in the month, but we really need to start preparing now.** clean_body: What does December mean to Congressional campaigns like ours? It means the end of another fundraising quarter. This is a huge deal for our campaign because we are required to publicly release our fundraising numbers. Everyone will be watching to see if w | | | Friend, What does December mean to you? For some people, it means the start of the holiday season, time to pull out those big winter coats, or a month-long excuse to stay indoors as much as possible. What does December mean to Congressional campaigns like ours?It means the end of another fundraising quarter. This is a huge deal for our campaign because we are required to publicly release our fundraising numbers. Everyone will be watching to see if we have what it takes to stay at the top of this competitive primary. We know it’s still early in the month, but we really need to start preparing now. ** Because we’re grassroots-funded and don’t take corporate money, the reality is that our campaign has to work twice as hard. It’s difficult, but we know how hard the working-class people of New York’s 17th have to fight just to make sure their families can make ends meet. They deserve a champion who will work tirelessly like them to bring real change to Congress. There’s no one better to do that than Mondaire. He’s been fighting his entire life so that everyone can have a real shot at the American dream. He knows firsthand what it means to struggle and what issues families stress about most — and on top of all of that, he isn’t afraid to stand up for progressive values. ** Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: ORTT RECEIVES PERFECT RATING FROM CONSERVATIVE PARTY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| **ORTT RECEIVES PERFECT RATING FROM CONSERVATIVE PARTY** _A press release from Bronze Star recipient and New York State Senator Rob Ortt_ Niagara County, NY --- Today, New York State Senator Rob Ortt received a perfect score from the Conservative Party of New York State. Each year, the Conservative Party rates New York State Legislators based on how these state representatives vote on various bills and issues from the previous year. Based on his votes in the 2019 Legislative Session, Sen. Rob Ortt has received a 100.

“As a result of the 2018 elections, New York has been set on the dangerous path of enacting extreme and ultra-progressive policies,” said Sen. Ortt. “I am proud to have stood firm on my beliefs as a Conservative and a Christian, stood up for the Conservative values our nation was founded upon, and pushed back on the radical legislation that the regressive left has forced upon the residents of New York State. Because New York serves as a blueprint for the national Democratic Party, we must have a staunch Conservative representing NY-27 who will stand firm when these same policies are pushed by radicals like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez on the national level.”

Sen. Ortt has served as a champion for New York’s pro-life community, a defender of religious freedom, and an advocate for Second Amendment rights. This is the third time that he has received the Conservative Party’s highest rating in the State Senate since joining the Legislature five years ago.

“I would like to thank New York State Conservative Party Chairman Gerard Kassar, Erie County Conservative Party Chairman Ralph Lorigo, and the Niagara County Conservative Party for their support and recognition. NY-27 must be represented by an individual who is proud to stand up for the conservative values of those held by so many in Western New York. Each day, we continue to see an assault on not only our president but on our fundamental values by the radical left. President Trump needs strong allies who will stand with him against these assaults, and at a time when our values are under attack, I have been a battle-tested defender of those values. I am proud to be recognized.” ###
_After the terror attacks on September 11, 2001, Ortt enlisted in the U.S. Army and would serve as a First Lieutenant in Afghanistan during Operation Enduring Freedom. During his service, Ortt would be awarded the Bronze Star, the Army Commendation Medal, the Afghanistan Campaign Medal, and the Combat Infantryman’s Badge. Ortt was also deployed to the U.S. Southern border as part of the recently declassified 2006 Operation Jumpstart, which supported border security and construction of a border fence._

---

name: Kim Maier
subject: How we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
In 2018, I was part of the team that took on Chris Smith and we gave him a run for his money. Now I'm back to finish this job and elect Stephanie.
|
---

| | Friends, I want to introduce myself. My name's Kim and I came on board as Stephanie's Campaign Manager in November. **I'll get right to the point:[I'm going to ask you to make a grassroots donation to Stephanie's campaign.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff090/522d4087/7afca10e/4f34198f/2871160736/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191205_em")** I'm no stranger to this district or Chris Smith. I was the Campaign Manager for this race in 2018. We had a strong Democratic candidate, raised good money, and gave Chris Smith a real fight -- his closest race since 1982. When Stephanie asked me to come back and finish the job, I couldn't say no. From Day 1, she has refused corporate PAC money. Our hard-working team has centered their work on serving and representing this district. Stephanie's out talking to voters and raising grassroots donations. **She's building a real grassroots supporter base.** **That 's how we'll win. That's how we'll finish the job we started in 2018.** [**So, if you 're like us, and you want to send Chris Smith packing after 39 years in office we need you to chip in right now.**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff090/522d4087/7afca10e/4f34198f/2871160736/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191205_em") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[Donate $10 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff090/522d4087/7afca10e/4f34198e/2871160736/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191205_em_express_lane_10")**
