**[Donate $35 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff090/522d4087/7afca10e/4f34198c/2871160736/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20191205_em_express_lane_35")**
---
**[Other amount](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff090/522d4087/7afca10e/4f34198b/2871160736/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191205_em_express_lane_other")**

Thank you,
Kim Maier
Campaign Manager

_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

We had a strong Democratic candidate, raised good money, and gave Chris Smith a real fight -- his closest race since 1982. When Stephanie asked me to come back and finish the job, I couldn't say no. From Day 1, she has refused corporate PAC money. Our hard-working team has centered their work on serving and representing this district. Stephanie's out talking to voters and raising grassroots donations. She's building a real grassroots supporter base. That 's how we'll win. That's how we'll finish the job we started in 2018. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" "" "" "" Thank you, Kim Maier Campaign Manager | | | Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey. Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=emfooter&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5 Stephanie for New Jersey P.O. Box 217 Little Silver, NJ 07739 Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to "" at any time.

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: TAKE ACTION: New report outlines major concerns for Georgia's new voting system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Check out our new joint report about Georgia's Election System. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bd/34a064cc/1b1b9c84/70363b8/2913205024/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Fair Fight Action, FreedomWorks and the National Election Defense Coalition have created the first county-level cost analysis of Georgia's new voting system based on limited public information. The first-of-its-kind analysis shows that over ten years the [**counties will be responsible for a combined $82 million as a result of the state's new election system.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bd/34a064cc/1b1b9c84/70363b9/2913205024/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/document/d/1AFj7hOohTrjOdF0srrFkTK92yEJhgKbgZgLV9UJzeek/edit?ts=5de55c36") While the Secretary of State has given the counties the impression that everything is paid for, hidden costs abound for additional machines, warranties, licensing and the like. In addition to hidden costs, the report shows that the state is failing to provide enough voting machines to counties in order to meet their statutorily required mandate under House Bill 316. These are the same machines where in the 2019 municipal elections, six Georgia counties tested the new machines. [**Each of the six counties experienced problems**. ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bd/34a064cc/1b1b9c84/70363c6/2913205024/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.ajc.com/news/state--regional-govt--politics/problems-with-new-georgia-voting-system-found-test-election/ecG0woZOPyhStos6bgb1hO/#") Another poorly executed election would be a major black eye on the State of Georgia and unless things change fast, that's where we're headed. County officials deserve answers on where the training and resources will come from. This report begins to provide some of those answers, but the Secretary of State must do his job and respond to the questions of every election official and ever county. **The full analysis can be viewed at **[**GeorgiaVotingMachines.com**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bd/34a064cc/1b1b9c84/70363c7/2913205024/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://georgiavotingmachines.com") Join Fair Fight Action to demand answers from the Secretary of State and Governor* Kemp's friends so we can ensure that Georgia's counties will be prepared for our 2020 elections. **Location: **Georgia State Capitol, Room 341 206 Washington Street SW, Atlanta, GA 30334 **Can 't attend either event but want to take action? **
1. Call the Secretary of State at 844-753-7825 to demand his office provide answers and resources to Georgia counties to ensure we have free and fair elections in 2020 and beyond.
2. Post on your social media pages:
* _ Facebook:_ A bipartisan analysis by Fair Fight Action and conservative organizations outlines the massive unfunded mandates that will cost Georgia counties millions, and the counties aren't receiving answers. Secretary of State **Raffensperger needs to provide answers now. **See the numbers here: [GeorgiaVotingMachines.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bd/34a064cc/1b1b9c84/70363c4/2913205024/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://t.co/bxdmUYPeYi?amp=1")

| | Thank you -- We're off to a great start to our campaign! This has been a big week. **The courts officially ruled that the new congressional maps in North Carolina _will_ stand for the 2020 elections,_and_ we launched our campaign for North Carolina's newly drawn 6th Congressional District, which is more Democratic-leaning and covers Greensboro, High Point, and Winston-Salem. And yesterday, I officially filed to run!** In 2018, we started a grassroots movement to give the Triad the leadership it deserves in Washington, leadership focused on quality jobs, accessible health care and affordable education. Now we're moving full steam ahead to finish what we started. [_**We not only need to maintain the momentum that we started in 2018, but _now we also need to build on it_. Will you chip in $5 or $10 today and become a Founding Grassroots Supporter to our 2020 campaign?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3d9/3d199a51/2f2f7b93/7364e51c/4153694141/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIwNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191205?refcode=kme191205_m_other&refcode2=17426") Thank you for being a part of my team, Kathy | | | [Donate](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3d9/3d199a51/2f2f7b93/7364e51c/4153694141/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIwNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191205?refcode=kme191205_m_other&refcode2=17426")

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: [CORRECTION] TAKE ACTION: New report outlines major concerns for Georgia's new voting system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Check out our new joint report about Georgia's Election System. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bc/34a064cc/1b15a1e3/70362cd/663003149/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Hi Friend, Fair Fight Action, FreedomWorks and the National Election Defense Coalition have created the first county-level cost analysis of Georgia's new voting system based on limited public information. The first-of-its-kind analysis shows that over ten years the **counties will be responsible for a[combined $82 million](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bc/34a064cc/1b15a1e3/70362ca/663003149/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/document/d/1AFj7hOohTrjOdF0srrFkTK92yEJhgKbgZgLV9UJzeek/edit?ts=5de55c36") as a result of the state's new election system. ** While the Secretary of State has given the counties the impression that everything is paid for, hidden costs abound for additional machines, warranties, licensing and the like. In addition to hidden costs, the report shows that the state is failing to provide enough voting machines to counties in order to meet their statutorily required mandate under House Bill 316. These are the same machines where in the 2019 municipal elections, six Georgia counties tested the new machines. **[Each of the six counties experienced problems.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bc/34a064cc/1b15a1e3/70362cb/663003149/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.ajc.com/news/state--regional-govt--politics/problems-with-new-georgia-voting-system-found-test-election/ecG0woZOPyhStos6bgb1hO/#")** Another poorly executed election would be a major black eye on the State of Georgia and unless things change fast, that's where we're headed. County officials deserve answers on where the training and resources will come from. This report begins to provide some of those answers, but the Secretary of State must do his job and respond to the questions of every election official and ever county. **The full analysis can be viewed at[GeorgiaVotingMachines.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bc/34a064cc/1b15a1e3/70362c8/663003149/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://GeorgiaVotingMachines.com")** **WHAT CAN YOU DO?** **Pack the Courtroom: Status Hearing on Georgia 's New Machines on Friday, December 6 at 11 AM**
RSVP here: [https://www.facebook.com/events/1012295992462904/](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bc/34a064cc/1b15a1e3/70362c9/663003149/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/events/1012295992462904/") After the state's failed pilot of the new voting machines in November, Judge Totenberg has called in the parties of the Curling v. Raffensperger for a status hearing on Georgia's new voting machines. Join Fair Fight Action in supporting the organizational plaintiffs as they continue to fight for free and fair elections and demand answers from the Secretary of State about Georgia's new voting system. We must show the courts that Georgia voters are concerned with the new machines and the implementation process. **Location:** Richard B. Russell Federal Building
75 Spring Street SW, Atlanta, GA 30303 **Pack the State Election Board Meeting on Tuesday, December 17 at 9 AM**
RSVP here: [https://www.facebook.com/events/1444860209014087/](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bc/34a064cc/1b15a1e3/70362d6/663003149/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/events/1444860209014087/") Join Fair Fight Action to demand answers from the Secretary of State and Governor* Kemp's friends so we can ensure that Georgia's counties will be prepared for our 2020 elections. **Location:** Georgia State Capitol, Room 341
206 Washington Street SW, Atlanta, GA 30334 Can't attend either event but want to take action? 1\. Call the Secretary of State at 844-753-7825 to demand his office provide answers and resources to Georgia counties to ensure we have free and fair elections in 2020 and beyond. 2\. Post on your social media pages: Facebook:

clean_body: Check out our new joint report about Georgia's Election System. | "" | | Hi Friend, Fair Fight Action, FreedomWorks and the National Election Defense Coalition have created the first county-level cost analysis of Georgia's new voting system based on limited public information. The first-of-its-kind analysis shows that over ten years the counties will be responsible for a "" as a result of the state's new election system. While the Secretary of State has given the counties the impression that everything is paid for, hidden costs abound for additional machines, warranties, licensing and the like. In addition to hidden costs, the report shows that the state is failing to provide enough voting machines to counties in order to meet their statutorily required mandate under House Bill 316. These are the same machines where in the 2019 municipal elections, six Georgia counties tested the new machines. "#" Another poorly executed election would be a major black eye on the State of Georgia and unless things change fast, that's where we're headed. County officials deserve answers on where the training and resources will come from. This report begins to provide some of those answers, but the Secretary of State must do his job and respond to the questions of every election official and ever county. The full analysis can be viewed at "" WHAT CAN YOU DO? Pack the Courtroom: Status Hearing on Georgia 's New Machines on Friday, December 6 at 11 AM RSVP here: "" After the state's failed pilot of the new voting machines in November, Judge Totenberg has called in the parties of the Curling v. Raffensperger for a status hearing on Georgia's new voting machines. Join Fair Fight Action in supporting the organizational plaintiffs as they continue to fight for free and fair elections and demand answers from the Secretary of State about Georgia's new voting system. We must show the courts that Georgia voters are concerned with the new machines and the implementation process. Location: Richard B. name: Sara 2020
subject: Republicans' 1820 Super PAC just launched nearly $400,000 in ads supporting Collins' campaign.
body:
It's everything people hate about politics.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fa2/4bef7a87/6b958271/287fe49e/2427738477/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**A billionaire CEO is funding a super PAC supporting Susan Collins in return for her support on the GOP Tax Bill.**
[**Make a $3 contribution now as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of Susan Collins ' high-dollar, special interest fundraising -> **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fa2/4bef7a87/6b958271/287fe49d/2427738477/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191205-2-full")
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fa2/4bef7a87/6b958271/287fe49d/2427738477/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191205-2-full")******
Friends,
**Republicans ' 1820 Super PAC just launched nearly $400,000 in ads supporting Collins' campaign. **
We're not surprised. 1820 PAC is funded by the billionaire CEO of the country's largest private equity firm, the Blackstone Group. He called the GOP tax bill a "whopper" for the billions the private equity industry stood to gain. Now, in return for Collins help in passing the tax bill, he's funding a super PAC to boost her reelection and his company is the top contributor to her campaign.
**This right here is everything people hate about politics, and it 's why we are funding our campaign differently -- powered by lots of people giving modest donations. But that means we have to ask:**
[**Can you make a $3 contribution now as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of Susan Collins ' high-dollar, special interest fundraising?**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fa2/4bef7a87/6b958271/287fe49d/2427738477/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191205-2-full")
Susan Collins' campaign is bankrolled by big donors and corporate PACs. We saw that on her fundraising report last quarter. But if we keep fighting, we're going to replace her with Sara Gideon, a real champion for working people.
All our best,
Team Gideon
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fa2/4bef7a87/6b958271/287fe49d/2427738477/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191205-2-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fa2/4bef7a87/6b958271/287fe49c/2427738477/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fa2/4bef7a87/6b958271/287fe493/2427738477/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

A typical presidential candidate spends hours and hours a week doing "call time" -- also known as calling wealthy donors and asking for money.

Not Elizabeth. She doesn't spend any of her time courting wealthy donors to fund her campaign. Instead, she values the time she spends talking with supporters from across the country at town halls.

**And today she's doing her own style of "call time" -- thanking a few of the grassroots donors who give what they can to this email, whether it's $5, $10, or $50.**

[**She might even give you a call. Chip in anything you can right now, and keep your phone close by today. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dean?=
subject: Stand with me to preserve our American Dreams
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7d7dd9d2c963/stand-with-me-to-preserve-our-american-dreams?e=6800876418)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Dear Friends,

It has been a wonderful meeting people and attending events throughout the PA-7th Congressional District. It is an honor and privilege to listen to the hopes, dreams and concerns of the people I hope to represent in Congress. Throughout my travel in the district, one thing is very clear. We have an unbreakable American spirit, full of hope and with an eye on building and maintaining the best America for us and future generations to come. Please contribute to my campaign today so we may continue down the right path for our nation.

The PA-7th Congressional District is one that Nancy Pelosi and the Democratic machine have targeted as critical for their quest to keep the majority in Congress and keep Pelosi as the Speaker. After just a year in office, Susan Wild and the Democrats have shown that they want to return us to the failed domestic and international policies that hurt our economy, hurt our security and ultimately hurt the American people. We need people in Congress who will work tirelessly to implement President Trump’s agenda, so we may continue prospering domestically and being strong on the international stage. Please contribute $25, $50 or $100 today to send a message that the PA-7th Congressional District will not be part of the Democrats play for power. We are a land of individual liberties and rights that guarantee us the opportunity to peruse our vision of the American Dream. Please stand with me and continue to fight for our American Dream.
Click here to donate!

[https://secure.winred.com/DeanBrowning/donate](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=5ef39c99f4&e=6800876418)

Thank you and God Bless,
Dean

Dear Friends and Supporters, I am so honored to announce that our campaign has earned [our first national endorsement](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_AA/ni0YAA/t.2xa/X36mpmBPQOmuDXTUDK7S3Q/h1/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCxY6T2MO5W9oklj3j8UV39dlANgy2u8tNfkG9Rst-2B1cmBwPadqwBidVvdTUaWZqigjAw4uxuZWeTYfDW3ivuvQ4-2BzoMQT76TDLEkRmhoJpgmwVDR8P1AxKuNuudPTI9Qcb3Umcz5a1AkpByt9I0EGgF6qK8fq-2Fhc8UTOXw51CWnuLQt6JTBvLT-2FUNxNKVcx7Rqd0mHEUEridCoDXc8Xxug0gC68DulRyoxgMUQl0ntOab7MOwtwqzAPAQ3WrFTxl-2BWAFWBNv5OpguxmB24v7GY3/BmKM) from the climate champions at 350-Action! We couldn't be prouder of their support for our strong stand against the proposed Pacific Connector fracked gas pipeline and Jordan Cove LNG, and our vision for a Green New Deal that delivers quality jobs and real change for Oregonians. Last night I was in Roseburg for our record-breaking, sold-out fundraising dinner with Douglas County supporters. I am humbled by their generous support for this campaign; they are all in, because everything is on the line. Thanks to the relentless grassroots organizing in the rural communities of Southern Oregon over the last 15 years, Pembina's fossil fuel pipeline hasn't gone in the ground yet. And together, we will make sure it never does. Together, we're taking the fight against new fossil fuels to Congress. Thank you for being in this fight with us. Onward, Doyle
---

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friends and Supporters, I am so honored to announce that our campaign has earned from the climate champions at 350-Action! We couldn't be prouder of their support for our strong stand against the proposed Pacific Connector fracked gas pipeline and Jordan Cove LNG, and our vision for a Green New Deal that delivers quality jobs and real change for Oregonians. Last night I was in Roseburg for our record-breaking, sold-out fundraising dinner with Douglas County supporters. I am humbled by their generous support for this campaign; they are all in, because everything is on the line. Thanks to the relentless grassroots organizing in the rural communities of Southern Oregon over the last 15 years, Pembina's fossil fuel pipeline hasn't gone in the ground yet. And together, we will make sure it never does. Together, we're taking the fight against new fossil fuels to Congress. Thank you for being in this fight with us. Onward, Doyle | | You're Invited to the Holiday Party of the Year! Bring your kids and join us for breakfast as we celebrate the holidays (AND meet our end of quarter grassroots fundraising goals!) Where: Campaign HQ - 1492 W 6th Ave Eugene When: Dec 15 from 10am-1pm What: Delicious Breakfast and... Holiday Pajama Competition Don your cutest morning attire and be ready for some fierce competition as we will be giving out prizes to the most adorable and the most entertaining holiday themed PJs Kids Snowflake Making Workshop Don't let the little ones miss out! We will keep them entertained by decorating the office with fun snowflakes! Santa will be stopping by and playing some fiddle tunes for our little guests...you don't want to miss it! | Join Us on Wednesday Evenings to Reach Out to Democrats in District 4! December 11: December 18: | Attention Portland! Sunday December 9 2:00 - 4:00 PM Party at the Pink House with Doyle Canning 3406 W. Burnside St. Portland, Oregon Hosted by: Khanh Pham, Kelly Campbell, Daphne Wysham, Julia DeGraw, Nick Caleb, Huy Ong, Melanie Plaut, Maria Hernandez Segoviano, Ray Anderson, Gabriela Rodriguez, and Damon Motz-Storey. Please join us this Sunday Dec 9th for a special afternoon in Portland to get an inside look at Doyle Canning's 2020 Congressional Campaign in Oregon's 4th district, and her vision for a Green New Deal for Oregon. | | Climate Strike Corvallis, Friday Dec. 6 Canning for Congress will be joining the Sunrise Movement in CORVALLIS for Friday's climate strike. Meet us at noon on the steps of the Memorial Union on the OSU campus. . | HOST A HOUSE PARTY So many supporters are opening their homes and checkbooks to power this campaign! We've been in Corvallis, Eugene, Coos Bay, Roseburg, Albany, Cottage Grove and more. Do you want to host a house party for your friends and community? We're scheduling for January now! Reply to this email... | APPLY : FELLOWSHIP APPLICATIONS ROLLING DEADLINE Your movement, your campaign. Join us as a Fellow this fall! This is an unpaid opportunity available to anyone with interest in getting Doyle elected, civic engagement, and political campaigning. You do NOT need to be a student to participate! We are recruiting fellows across the district, from Coos Bay to Corvallis. Learn more at | | | | Sent Via . subject: MJ asked us to reach out to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We'll be blunt. This campaign will only defeat entrenched politician Senator John Cornyn if we can build one of the biggest grassroots teams in Texas history.

|

Peter -- We'll be blunt. This campaign will only defeat entrenched politician Senator John Cornyn if we can build one of the biggest grassroots teams in Texas history. **_That 's why MJ asked us to reach out to you personally about her Grassroots Dollar Drive!_**

**[Will you pitch in just $1 to be a part of the movement that will DEFEAT Senator Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890926/7f51f7bc/4bbf78e5/4ef08f92/750270747/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-grassrootsdollardrive?refcode=email_20191205nd__588__&amount=1&recurring=true")**

**$1 may not seem like a lot, but your grassroots donation will be bundled with _thousands_ of others from across Texas and the nation. They'll all add up to make a HUGE difference in this race!**
**[**DONATE $1 NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890926/7f51f7bc/4bbf78e5/4ef08f92/750270747/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-grassrootsdollardrive?refcode=email_20191205nd__588__&amount=1&recurring=true")**
After 17 years of selling Texans out to the highest bidder, Senator John Cornyn has a nearly $11 million war chest built with the help of corporate PACs -- and more special interest money will be flooding Texas soon.

**We don 't need to match them dollar for dollar.** We just need enough to build a winning campaign: to pay for key staff, to help MJ travel across the state, and to spread her message of a _new_ Senate that works for _all_ of us.

**We can 't do this without you. Will you contribute a single dollar (or whatever you can) today? **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Who said it?
body:
I want you to read this quote:
“We are here today because the Democrats in the House are paralyzed with their hatred of. . .
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355681-829598-4742838-35908d7f6e-0b4dd021b6)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355681-829598-4742838-35908d7f6e-0b4dd021b6) I want you to read this quote:

> “We are here today because the Democrats in the House are paralyzed with their hatred of President Trump. And until the Democrats free themselves of this hatred, our country will suffer.
>
> “I rise to oppose the unfair motions which call for the removal of the president of the United States from office.”
Want to guess who said it?

Actually, no one . . . yet.

But here’s what Nancy Pelosi told the nation as she voted against the impeachment of Bill Clinton 21 years ago:

> “We are here today because the Republicans in the House are paralyzed with their hatred of President Clinton. And until the Republicans free themselves of this hatred, our country will suffer.
>
> “I rise to oppose the unfair motions which call for the removal of the president of the United States from office.”
This morning, Nancy Pelosi pulled the political trigger and moved forward to impeach President Donald J. Trump.

This is an unconstitutional sham manufactured by Democrats who are OBSESSED with hating President Trump.

They want to hurt him anyway they can while influencing the 2020 Elections.

Democrats are drooling at the thought of running ads next year labeling President Trump as “impeached” and “disgraced”.

It’s disgusting.

So let’s throw the past in their face by [**sharing the quote above on social media**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355681-829598-4742838-35908d7f6e-0b4dd021b6).

Twenty-One years ago, William Jefferson Clinton was impeached for lying under oath about his relationship with a White House Intern.

That happened on December 19th, 1998 after a nearly FIVE-YEAR investigation!

After a few weeks of hearing from third-party and anonymous sources, House Democrats are moving forward to impeach OUR President **based on absolutely no hard evidence**.

We all saw Bill Clinton, under oath, biting his lip and saying, “I did not have sexual relations with that woman.”

Bill Clinton’s crime (not to mention his unethical conduct in the White House) was on full display at the time. It was undeniable.

Where is the evidence against President Trump?

**It simply does not exist.**

[**Help me remind Nancy Pelosi that our country will suffer**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355681-829598-4742838-35908d7f6e-0b4dd021b6) until she and other Democrats – including my opponent, Lois Frankel – free themselves of their hatred of President Trump.

[**Click here to send the message.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355681-829598-4742838-35908d7f6e-0b4dd021b6)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-355681-829598-84585d41bbe610b-0b4dd021b6)

---

name: Gary Peters
subject: do you have a moment? (looking for your input)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
With the election right around the corner, I really want to hear what's on your mind.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa3/5721a3ed/71d7ce5f/efaa242/2018288491/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,

There's one thing that motivates me above anything else in the Senate - and that's getting things done for the people of Michigan. Often times, that means passing legislation to make a real difference in people's lives. Other times, it means demanding the truth and protecting our democratic institutions.
So when it comes to what's happening in Washington right now, I'm determined to fight for accountability, honesty and transparency. Americans deserve that from their government.
Trust me, I know everything that's going on right now can feel chaotic. That's why I think it's important to take a step back and check in with you. Especially with the year coming to an end - and as we enter a critical election year - I want to know what issues are most important to you.
**So I've put together this new survey to get your feedback. With the election right around the corner, I really want to hear what's on your mind. [Can you take just a moment to submit your feedback? You can use this link: https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-Priorities](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-Priority-Dec-Survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk152-su-nd")**
In the year ahead, it will be more important than ever to come together and fight for what's right. I appreciate you taking the time.

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa3/5721a3ed/71d7ce5f/efaa240/2018288491/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa3/5721a3ed/71d7ce5f/efaa25f/2018288491/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa3/5721a3ed/71d7ce5f/efaa25e/2018288491/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa3/5721a3ed/71d7ce5f/efaa25d/2018288491/VEsA/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa3/5721a3ed/71d7ce5f/efaa240/2018288491/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa3/5721a3ed/71d7ce5f/efaa25f/2018288491/VEsO/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

**A:** [**The Democrats' Sham Impeachment →**](http://links.action.supportsenatorcotton.com/u/click?_t=62a450578d3d443d9e24ae604e25bd19&_m=651d0992176840f9b5ba6c910543bb19&_e=PLQuQ8GrGs0PVzrtwDzZg0al2-f0vJhptRmR808_1Zk6JTAaex13eB_CSCrkYdS5Hh-i8Gu7zZ1yqf9e4pIaYZs_sXgMeo-i8zhbTCrOOZcfDcnHOt_ioo6vmpDH_r-NKPte7NzVQEaUji_js5v-qqg96rT6Gha28tKWaT8ZuqODJ0y0M94g9QhOx82J-MtkXJMRHFY3zwXzXNV6Zbs-LnBZh3OJO0Fad-SWBpb1Yd_ZFUokDk5TR7hOelO3FtJw9MjmbT3Wv_T1N2VJlER2PvU7a-Pt5596noCBJLRYxxOQO3Uzndt2TnuTHNEjTZMDkVfkN5MuaEpm1VlBz9qsgBQkepWwUT_-zm1S_WU1HZAUIqgpEam2UY7U9jHAeCtVDURjpUORMafEOLhQkYxt1uEYOYhHoawkfc5V2E_x6iU%3D)
**OR**
**B:** [**Passing a budget, a defense bill, and _USMCA_ →**](http://links.action.supportsenatorcotton.com/u/click?_t=62a450578d3d443d9e24ae604e25bd19&_m=651d0992176840f9b5ba6c910543bb19&_e=PLQuQ8GrGs0PVzrtwDzZg0al2-f0vJhptRmR808_1Zk6JTAaex13eB_CSCrkYdS5Hh-i8Gu7zZ1yqf9e4pIaYZs_sXgMeo-i8zhbTCrOOZcfDcnHOt_ioo6vmpDH_r-NKPte7NzVQEaUji_js5v-qqg96rT6Gha28tKWaT8ZuqODJ0y0M94g9QhOx82J-MtkXJMRHFY3zwXzXNV6Zbs-Lum4HbY35DJD9fygEqwnvSp2O6bdYekewCaVML4M14oLPc9xqIqTusV4Lj2LWbtCEuKrUTH7lCNhKZlmLj8DnQX47hHXQrUwf1zBYTQxv0rSRC2lJ92Y6btwWvoGWeu2G_LyeK1LSDGvSqo_ahRex6ohu4tnEVW-03wv3NreVODMgouy2jSG-ybo1jkqeKc0tsfM3quHtP9aF0jE9a6KAzU%3D)
* * *
Friend,

There's a lot of work not getting done while Nancy Pelosi's House is obsessed with impeaching the President.
1. We haven't passed a budget to fund our government, or even our military.
2. We haven't passed the annual Defense bill that's been passed for 58 consecutive years.
3. We haven't passed the Mexico-Canada trade agreement (USMCA), to help all of our farmers, foresters, ranchers, and manufacturers.

The Democrat impeachment obsession is costing us, big time.

And here's the thing: even after Dems ram impeachment through in the House...no one expects there will be 67 Senate votes to remove the President from office.

This situation is terrible for our country, and we need to hold the Democrats responsible for the damaging mess they're creating at our expense.

In service,

Tom Cotton
United States Senator

_Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army.
Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch._

PO Box 7504
Little Rock, AR 72217-7504
| | PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc88b/3eb3e2fc/68eb432c/744d071c/3108050933/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191205_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191205_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc88b/3eb3e2fc/68eb432c/744d071b/3108050933/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191205_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191205_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). name: Bill Weld
subject: why we do what we do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu6X5CyMR5mEJWLdaAklojXE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191205fr&n=1) Hi Team, I wanted to send you a note today about why I’m in this race. If someone were to ask me why I got involved in politics, I could give an hour long answer about all the issues that are important to our campaign and to America. But it wouldn’t really answer the question, would it? I’m in this race because I demand that we talk about the things that Americans actually believe in. I'm in this race because our like-minded supporters care as much as we do. **I’m in this race because we have a responsibility to future generations** — a responsibility to speak up about American ideals, the rule of law, and what it takes to be the leader of the free world. We may not agree on every issue, but I promise to listen to your concerns. And at the end of the day, I want you to know that I’m both grateful and proud to have your support, because **nothing is more American than fighting to make this country a better place.** Thank you for all you do. — Bill | | [DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4lgOBX6cRlXAbqwpJ1beqnYA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191205fr&n=2)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mitch McConnell is a feckless little turtle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, #MoscowMitch McConnell, champion of respect, decency, and generosity, is eating his own words and showing America just how much of a weak, spineless turtle he is. Where once he lovingly referred to Joe Biden as "a real friend" and "a trusted partner," McConnell is now silent as Trump and the GOP assail his character from every angle. Kentucky voters have been paying attention to Mitch's weak behavior -- Republicans lost the governorship despite Trump campaigning hard and the state being R+15, spelling dark omens for McConnell's re-election bid in 2020. Now, he and his Democratic challenger, Amy McGrath, are nearly neck-and-neck in the polls, showing just how vulnerable he is. Sadly, we know Mitch doesn't listen to the will of voters or even care what they think -- he only cares about continuing his reign of hypocrisy and conservative stonewalling in the Senate. We need to know what Democrats think of him so we can create the best strategy to get rid of him in 2020: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc8b/6e9863e8/16ee3f42/1db0be34/990219377/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/2CFbFA9A") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc8b/6e9863e8/16ee3f42/1db0be34/990219377/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/2CFbFA9A") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc8b/6e9863e8/16ee3f42/1db0be3b/990219377/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcgrathvmitch-nd?refcode=OUT20191205c.ND&refcode2=d7fVfausGDJKQ5sbJmFk")

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, #MoscowMitch McConnell, champion of respect, decency, and generosity, is eating his own words and showing America just how much of a weak, spineless turtle he is. Where once he lovingly referred to Joe Biden as "a real friend" and "a trusted partner," McConnell is now silent as Trump and the GOP assail his character from every angle. Kentucky voters have been paying attention to Mitch's weak behavior -- Republicans lost the governorship despite Trump campaigning hard and the state being R+15, spelling dark omens for McConnell's re-election bid in 2020. Now, he and his Democratic challenger, Amy McGrath, are nearly neck-and-neck in the polls, showing just how vulnerable he is. Sadly, we know Mitch doesn't listen to the will of voters or even care what they think -- he only cares about continuing his reign of hypocrisy and conservative stonewalling in the Senate. We need to know what Democrats think of him so we can create the best strategy to get rid of him in 2020: Do you approve of Mitch McConnell? "" "" Thanks for your support, WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

name: Mike Turner
subject: URGENT NOTICE: Article of Impeachment moving forward!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Today, Nancy Pelosi has instructed the House to move forward with articles of impeachment against President Trump.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**" Today, I am asking our chairman to proceed with Articles of Impeachment." \- Nancy Pelosi, 12/05/2019**
---
Peter,
George Washington warned in his farewell speech of partisan politics and the detrimental effects it could have dividing our country. Well, that warning has come full circle.
[_**Today, Nancy Pelosi has instructed the House to move forward with Articles of Impeachment against President Trump**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0). After weeks of countless partisan hearings aimed to rewrite the results of the 2016 presidential election, Pelosi has decided to formally move forward with Articles of Impeachment.
I sat in on the House Intelligence Committee's hearings and questioned Adam Schiff's witnesses myself. Pelosi, Schiff, and Jerry Nadler are driving towards impeachment to further their obstruction of President Trump.
Since day one of his administration, these obstructionists have refused to work together with him to move our country forward.
[_**This nonsense MUST end**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0). For weeks, Congress has been stalled because of impeachment. Americans have suffered as a result of Congress' inaction.
This is where you come in. We have a critical election in 2020. I **WILL** only win in 2020, if I have your support.
Will you help? It starts with YOU! [_**Will you donate to make sure we win in 2020?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**[YES! I will donate $75 NOW to win in 2020!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[YES! I will donate $55 NOW to win in 2020!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[YES! I will donate $35 NOW to win in 2020!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[YES! I will donate another amount NOW to win in 2020! ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
Peter, lets get Congress back to work. It's time to end the partisan political show and win in 2020!
Thank you,

Mike Turner
**[**DONATE!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDEyNzEwMDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDQ5MTYxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: Team Hick
subject: We have to.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
We don't want you to miss the point Shad just made: If we want to get our government working for us again, we have to take the Senate majority away from Mitch McConnell next year. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771438/691c9bd/6faf58ac/11a7c89c/1921332867/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

We don't want you to miss the point Shad just made: If we want to get our government working for us again, we have to take the Senate majority away from Mitch McConnell next year.

We have to.

This Senate has refused to vote on hundreds of bills that have already passed the House. Even if we win back the White House, if we don't take the gavel out of Mitch McConnell's hands, this obstruction won't end.

**That fight starts right here in Colorado, and it will take all of us. Chip in whatever you can right now:**

[**_Chip in._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191205_TH_20191205-fr-TH-legislationkicker-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Let's get to work,
Team Hickenlooper

\-----FORWARDED MESSAGE-----

**From:** Shad Murib, Team Hick
**Date:** December 5, 2019
**Subject:** Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard

**389 bills and 151 resolutions, team.**

That's how much legislation the Democratic House has passed or agreed to this year alone, but Mitch McConnell is holding up nearly all of it in the Senate.

He's single-handedly killed off legislation on everything from protecting Colorado's outdoor economy to raising the minimum wage, and his neglect is hurting Coloradans and millions of Americans every day.

We can put a stop to this next year, end McConnell's stranglehold on our democracy, and finally get government working for Coloradans. But, here's the deal--we HAVE to take the Senate back first. There's no other way.

[**_The path to stripping Mitch McConnell of his Senate majority starts right here in Colorado --you better believe McConnell and his allies are doing their best to hold on to it. Will you chip in whatever you can today?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191205_TH_20191205-fr-TH-legislationkicker-2mo_ndnr_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Here's just a sampling of policies that have been passed in the House that McConnell is stubbornly blocking in the Senate:

**Gun violence:** More than 90% of Americans support universal background checks as a tool to address the gun violence epidemic. The House passed a bill in February, but McConnell refuses to even bring it up for a vote.

**Climate change:** House Democrats have passed a comprehensive climate bill that calls on Donald Trump to rejoin the Paris Climate Accord. McConnell has gloated that the bill will "go nowhere" in the Senate.

**Violence against women:** The bipartisan Violence Against Women Act, originally passed in 1994, funds programs that are designed to protect women from violence. McConnell has sided with the NRA, and is against its reauthorization because the latest bill closes the "boyfriend loophole"--a provision that prevents partners who have been convicted of abuse and stalking from owning firearms.

**We can 't afford another minute of Mitch McConnell's partisan obstruction on the issues that matter most. Chip in now and make sure we take back the majority next November:** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191205_TH_20191205-fr-TH-legislationkicker-2mo_2mo_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $10 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20191205_TH_20191205-fr-TH-legislationkicker-2mo_2mo_expresslane10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $25 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_20191205_TH_20191205-fr-TH-legislationkicker-2mo_2mo_expresslane25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $50 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20191205_TH_20191205-fr-TH-legislationkicker-2mo_2mo_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $100 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20191205_TH_20191205-fr-TH-legislationkicker-2mo_2mo_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191205_TH_20191205-fr-TH-legislationkicker-2mo_2mo_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Onward,
Shad

Shad Murib
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191205_TH_20191205-fr-TH-legislationkicker-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771438/691c9bd/6faf58ac/11a7c893/1921332867/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771438/691c9bd/6faf58ac/11a7c890/1921332867/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771438/691c9bd/6faf58ac/11a7c891/1921332867/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771438/691c9bd/6faf58ac/11a7c88e/1921332867/VEsHAA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771438/691c9bd/6faf58ac/11a7c88f/1921332867/VEsHAw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771438/691c9bd/6faf58ac/11a7c88c/1921332867/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, [**_click here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771438/691c9bd/6faf58ac/11a7c88d/1921332867/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/id-like-to-get-less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771438/691c9bd/6faf58ac/11a7c893/1921332867/VEsHDA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: What we are collectively willing to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Ed's in a tough race right now, and he needs us behind him. | |
---
| Friends -

Ed's in a tough race right now, and he needs us behind him.

You see, this is a campaign for and powered by the people. Our path to victory depends on our ability to build a movement of working people ready to fight for our bold, progressive agenda.

Everything that we achieve will be a result of what we are collectively willing to do.

That means our work now will decide whether or not we rise together to meet the challenges of this moment, and **it starts with what you 're willing to do today.**

**[Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign today to help Ed stay in the fight for our shared values? He cannot do this alone.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df1d/693b8b0a/43b9ffaf/72de7d07/3449840877/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191205-full")**

Ed has spent his entire career fighting for us, and now it's our turn to have his back.

Thank you in advance for stepping up!

\- Team Markey

**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df1d/693b8b0a/43b9ffaf/72de7d07/3449840877/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191205-full")**

name: Tom Steyer
subject: The president has left us no choice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend: Earlier today, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced that the House is moving forward with drafting articles of impeachment, sending a clear message that we are not a monarchy or a dictatorship. Here, no one is above the law. President Trump can’t, in fact, do whatever he wants and get away with it. We are a democracy, and our leaders in the House are finally stepping up to do their constitutionally mandated duty to hold corrupt power to account. This is why I founded Need to Impeach in 2017, because I saw blatant corruption at the highest level and couldn’t sit idly by while the very foundations of our country unravelled. Although we still have what promises to be a highly charged Senate trial ahead of us, I’m proud that we've gotten this far. When someone abuses their power, openly defies the rule of law, and violates public trust every single day, we stand up together and say no. [_**If you’re ready to fight with me for a more equitable, just future, I hope you’ll sign up to volunteer.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BVe8uwcLFCySt5m-2Bu6LRY9duaj-2FsGNcOcvT4bdz8UF-2BLmPAIN4FGu6LuwyGC4hqJplHQSqMY-2B5Ebo4BZoEi-2BfEz9D0w6uEl-2BdQbKlSXH-2BPrxtZU-2FCgk2HU0XsQrE0O3sffTEWIOY-2FqUTtre6T6Dw2X8rKO8nkEn8oM2WxrOjMPIzA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcs3APi95KLwGctzLs7HXGnT1qSOeEHcrTdJ0haelkZWxA1EYM3kBdls8M6RMzLsX5t5Ig-2BQayEpAEmFwOos5VvUWqVoyIoMgMyE32IEe4OrA0J5mNBxBQrw9lEWVYeZHShQbCPgdpd-2F9acIwisO6YGCJmbMGa-2FABYjwxVHcjAjBNdXmL2A92q6vcbZeWlNsG9E5gaXJxB-2Bt1It1-2F5YD31RkGzBsfgXczA8-2FpeF1eAn94Hix7fXg0YGKIsZ6LLXwoogqy3MZ4fJGpuLxL3RzVUf8u8VS-2B3zyA4MEXRem0ejTH1U34bbQR6sJohoCPFRe5q1ICA-2B2ru86Vseua5og-2FR8c1uqIaNK43mu4qKbBwSmfHQYCecpflrOdpnOcvHJB1A-3D) I’m with you, whatever happens next. Onward,
Tom

clean_body: | | | | Friend: Earlier today, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced that the House is moving forward with drafting articles of impeachment, sending a clear message that we are not a monarchy or a dictatorship. Here, no one is above the law. President Trump can’t, in fact, do whatever he wants and get away with it. We are a democracy, and our leaders in the House are finally stepping up to do their constitutionally mandated duty to hold corrupt power to account. This is why I founded Need to Impeach in 2017, because I saw blatant corruption at the highest level and couldn’t sit idly by while the very foundations of our country unravelled. Although we still have what promises to be a highly charged Senate trial ahead of us, I’m proud that we've gotten this far. When someone abuses their power, openly defies the rule of law, and violates public trust every single day, we stand up together and say no. I’m with you, whatever happens next. #
Dear Friends,

We have a choice to make this election cycle. Do we want a Congressperson who is going to avoid taking a stance on the tough issues and who won’t say what they believe? OR do we want a Congressman Dean Browning who will be a Congressperson for us and who will be clear and transparent about his beliefs and goals. Please donate today and help spread Dean’s message throughout the PA-7th Congressional District

If Dean’s opponent were to be re- elected, it is almost certain that Nancy Pelosi would remain as Speaker of the House of Representatives which would damage our economy and our nation tremendously.

Friends, we cannot let this happen. We have made too much progress and ushered in too much prosperity under President Trump’s leadership to let Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats continue to try and undo everything. Dean has the winning message and would be a Congressman we could all be proud of. But he will not be able to get that message out without you. Please donate $25, $50 or $100 today and let’s elect a Congressman for us – Dean Browning.

Click here to donate! [https://secure.winred.com/DeanBrowning/donate](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=6eabc3bc0b&e=6800876418)

Kelly Tain

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Read the White House’s response to Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s impeachment stunt
body:
Back in March, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi inadvertently previewed what would happen if Democrats rewarded their far-left base with... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1373368eec&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 5, 2019
---
| | |
# **Read the White House’s response to Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s impeachment stunt **

**Back in March,** House Speaker Nancy Pelosi inadvertently previewed what would happen if Democrats rewarded their far-left base with a partisan impeachment stunt.

**“Impeachment is so divisive** to the country that unless there’s something so compelling and overwhelming and bipartisan, I don’t think we should go down that path, because it divides the country,” she said.

**Many rolled their eyes—** not because Pelosi was wrong, but because they knew that liberal Democrats would force the Speaker’s hand sooner or later. Sure enough, this morning, she announced that House Democrats would pursue articles of impeachment.

** ** [**Press Secretary** : Here’s what Congress could’ve been doing this week.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=877310c355&e=3ee4985eea)

**Keep in mind** : In October, two moderate Democrats broke with the far left and joined all Republicans in voting against just the impeachment _probe._ In other words, even their phony “investigation” itself had bipartisan opposition. An actual impeachment vote is only more likely to drive a wedge between mainstream Americans and House liberals.

**Speaker Pelosi** and her caucus are now rushing full-speed ahead toward the fastest impeachment in American history. Why is that? It turns out the more Americans pay attention to what Democrats are doing, the more public support for impeachment drops. Democrat leaders thought that hours of free advertising through marathon TV hearings would work, but when witness after witness failed to produce any evidence of actual criminal wrongdoing by the President, [most Americans tuned out](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3c369c586b&e=3ee4985eea).

**So Pelosi was right,** of course. A partisan impeachment stunt to appease the left’s anti-Trump base will divide our country deeply. House Democrats just don’t care.

**White House Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham** issued the following statement today in response to Speaker Pelosi’s announcement:
| | _"At this morning’s press conference, Speaker Nancy Pelosi could have finally announced a vote on the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement that would immediately help America’s farmers, ranchers, businesses, and workers; or outlined a plan to work with the President to lower prescription drug prices; or addressed our Nation’s infrastructure.

Instead, Speaker Pelosi did exactly what she always does – ignore the needs of the American people and advance her selfish political desires. Democrats’ sham impeachment is a blatant, purely partisan attempt to overturn the results of a free and fair election. By their own admission, Democrats say they have to ‘impeach the President’ because they cannot defeat him at the ballot box."_ |
---|---|---

[Read the full statement from Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a93cf49a4&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:**[Democrats’ impeachment report highlights their own “colossal overreach”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac8e951ef2&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
## **The line the Swamp doesn’t want you see**

**There’s something Democrats** weren’t counting on when they decided to make their impeachment blitz official in September. Right after Speaker Pelosi launched the probe, President Trump released [the full transcript](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c6c973bea&e=3ee4985eea) of his call with Ukrainian President Zelensky.

**All the information** House Democrats were hoping to dig up—and then selectively leak to their friends in the media—became instantly available to every American citizen.

**One line from that call** came up during this week’s hearing, as Democrat witnesses tried to spin President Trump’s request for Ukraine to investigate corruption into a personal political favor.

**Here’s what President Trump** actually said: “I would like you to do _us_ a favor though, because _our country_ has been through a lot and Ukraine knows a lot about it.” The President goes on to call out potential foul play and meddling during the 2016 election.

**The** **language** makes clear that President Trump’s focus was on keeping his promise to the American people. For more than three years, after all, Washington politicians have claimed to want to get to the bottom of any potential corruption in our elections. Yet when it’s Democrats who may get in trouble, the Swamp fights to cover it up—every time.

**Given that Speaker Pelosi** is the same person who said, “We have to pass [Obamacare] so that you can find out what’s in it,” it’s fair to ask a simple question: Did she bother to read the Ukraine transcript, either?
---
|
---
|

By their own admission, Democrats say they have to ‘impeach the President’ because they cannot defeat him at the ballot box." | ---|---|--- More: | | The line the Swamp doesn’t want you see There’s something Democrats weren’t counting on when they decided to make their impeachment blitz official in September. Right after Speaker Pelosi launched the probe, President Trump released of his call with Ukrainian President Zelensky. All the information House Democrats were hoping to dig up—and then selectively leak to their friends in the media—became instantly available to every American citizen. One line from that call came up during this week’s hearing, as Democrat witnesses tried to spin President Trump’s request for Ukraine to investigate corruption into a personal political favor. Here’s what President Trump actually said: “I would like you to do us a favor though, because our country has been through a lot and Ukraine knows a lot about it.” The President goes on to call out potential foul play and meddling during the 2016 election. The language makes clear that President Trump’s focus was on keeping his promise to the American people. For more than three years, after all, Washington politicians have claimed to want to get to the bottom of any potential corruption in our elections. Yet when it’s Democrats who may get in trouble, the Swamp fights to cover it up—every time. Given that Speaker Pelosi is the same person who said, “We have to pass [Obamacare] so that you can find out what’s in it,” it’s fair to ask a simple question: Did she bother to read the Ukraine transcript, either? | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by Joyce N.
